articles.author: Kirsten Korosec
articles.title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills - TechCrunch
articles.description: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.
articles.content: General Motors has laid off more than 10% of its IT department, or about 600 salaried employees in a deliberate skills swap: clearing out workers whose expertise no longer fits and making room for so… [+2767 chars]

articles.title: Linux bitten by second severe vulnerability in as many weeks - Ars Technica
articles.description: Production-version patches are coming online and should be installed pronto.

articles.author: Amanda Silberling
articles.title: Finally, texts between Android and iPhone users can be end-to-end encrypted - TechCrunch
articles.description: Google had urged Apple for years to support RCS texting to make communication between each company's devices more seamless.
articles.content: At long last, Android and iPhone users will be able to send each other end-to-end encrypted text messages. On Monday, end-to-end encrypted messaging is starting to roll out in beta for conversations … [+2162 chars]
